CustomField.description: Indicates if the cash has been received and recorded. This checkbox is editable only for head lessor payments (invoice type includes HL/SL). If cash is not received, journals will be marked as excluded.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates whether the cash has been received. This field is primarily utilized in head lease/sublease structures to specify whether the payment has been received at the head lessor levels. If unchecked, the journals will be marked as excluded.
CustomField.label: Cash Received?
